Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$vbm = 'C:\\Program Files\\Oracle\\VirtualBox\\VBoxManage.exe'
\\$vhd = 'C:\\Users\\i.baouche\\projects\\micro-os\\micro-nt-os\\target\\vbox\\micro-nt-os.vhd'

" 2>&1)
